subcodes.first_line: The one incomparable Lord - exalted be His glory, abundant His bounty, and mighty His sovereignty - hath ever been and will forever remain worthy of all praise, thanksgiving and glorification [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوند یکتا جل جلاله و عم نواله و عز شانه مستحق حمد و شکر و ثنا بوده و هست و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
